name: chain_ph_launch_gately_everything_you_need_
method: [PH LAUNCH] Gately: Everything you need to build your own membership

stages.task: Scrape Gately PH page + website for features, pricing, use cases, screenshots
Pull top 5 competing membership tools (Whop, Memberful, Circle, Kajabi, Skool) — features + pricing from existing cache or Playwright
Generate 1200-word SEO comparison page targeting 'best membership site software 2026' + 'Gately vs Memberful' etc. Include comparison table, pros/cons, affiliate CTA
Deploy to surge.sh as /best-membership-platform or similar slug. Update sitemap.
